SHORT NAME: CLM_ADMSN_DT 

LONG NAME: CLM_ADMSN_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: For HH, this date indicates the date the home health plan was established or last reviewed. 

The date in this variable may precede the claim from date (CLM_FROM_DT) if this claim is for a 
beneficiary who has been continuously under care.
